title: Mixed Baby Greens with Fennel, Oranges, and Caramelized Onions
ingredients: 1 jumbo sweet yellow onion, thinly sliced
1 bulb fresh fennel, outer part and tougher fronds removed, thinly sliced
2 large navel oranges, skinned and sliced into thin circles
instructions: In a medium skillet, sauté onion in butter on low heat until golden and caramelized, about 20 minutes.
Place greens, fennel, oranges, pecans, and feta cheese in a bowl.
Combine olive oil, balsamic vinegar, Dijon mustard, chopped fresh chives, salt, and black pepper in a small bowl or container.
Drizzle most of the dressing over the greens.
Garnish the top of the salad with fresh pansies.
notes: If you want to omit the onions, add avocado to the recipe instead
